---
title: "Islander"
author:
  - "Trần Việt Hà"
  - "Nguyễn Đình Mai Vi"
  - "Vũ Hà Thư"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d/%m/%Y')`"

output:

  pdf_document:
    toc: false
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
    latex_engine: xelatex
    keep_tex: false
    includes:
      in_header: header-includes.tex
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    number_sections: true
    df_print: paged

fontsize: 11pt
geometry: margin=2.5cm
mainfont: "Times New Roman"
bibliography: references.bib
link-citations: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Render Unicode (Vietnamese) text in plots correctly.
# The default pdf() device cannot draw Vietnamese diacritics, and cairo_pdf
# is unavailable here (needs XQuartz). showtext draws text as glyphs from a
# system font file, so it works on the default device with full Unicode.
#
# NOTE: "/System/Library/Fonts/Times.ttc" is Apple's own "Times" clone, a
# different, glyph-reduced font from the actual "Times New Roman" used by
# xelatex for the body text (mainfont, YAML above). That reduced glyph set is
# missing some Vietnamese letters (e.g. "o with circumflex + grave" as in
# "hồi") and mis-shapes some clusters (e.g. "ươ" as in "Tương"), so chart
# titles using those words showed as tofu boxes or malformed glyphs. Pointing
# at the real Times New Roman.ttf (same font family the body text already
# renders correctly) fixes this; Times.ttc is kept only as a fallback for
# machines where the Supplemental font isn't installed.
library(showtext)
times_path <- "/System/Library/Fonts/Supplemental/Times New Roman.ttf"
if (!file.exists(times_path)) times_path <- "/System/Library/Fonts/Times.ttc"
if (file.exists(times_path)) sysfonts::font_add("Times", regular = times_path)
showtext_auto()

# ggplot's default text family ("") is not the "Times" family registered above,
# so showtext falls back to a substitute font instead. Setting base_family
# here forces every ggplot chart to use the font registered above, without
# editing each individual theme() call.
ggplot2::theme_set(ggplot2::theme_gray(base_family = "Times"))

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.showtext = TRUE,
  # Figures wider than the page's text width (e.g. fig.width = 7.5in against
  # ~6.3in of usable width under margin=2.5cm) were embedded via bare
  # \includegraphics with no scaling, so they bled past the right margin and
  # clipped content in multi-panel charts. Scaling every figure to the text
  # width fixes this uniformly without changing any individual chunk options.
  out.width = "100%"
)
```

```{=latex}
\begin{titlepage}
\thispagestyle{empty}

\begin{tikzpicture}[remember picture, overlay]
  \draw[line width=2pt, blue!80!black]
    ([xshift=0.9cm, yshift=-0.9cm]current page.north west)
    rectangle
    ([xshift=-0.9cm, yshift=0.9cm]current page.south east);
  \draw[line width=0.5pt, blue!80!black]
    ([xshift=1.1cm, yshift=-1.1cm]current page.north west)
    rectangle
    ([xshift=-1.1cm, yshift=1.1cm]current page.south east);
\end{tikzpicture}

\begin{center}

\vspace*{0.8cm}
{\LARGE\bfseries TRƯỜNG ĐẠI HỌC KHOA HỌC TỰ NHIÊN}\\[0.3em]
{\LARGE\bfseries KHOA TOÁN -- TIN HỌC}

\vspace{1.5cm}

\IfFileExists{logo.png}{\includegraphics[width=4cm]{logo.png}}{}

\vspace{1.5cm}

{\Large\bfseries BÁO CÁO}\\[0.5em]
{\LARGE\bfseries MÔ HÌNH HÓA THỐNG KÊ}\\[0.7em]
\rule{0.6\textwidth}{0.5pt}\\[0.6em]
{\large Bài thực hành 4: \textbf{Islander}}

\vspace{1.5cm}

{\large Giảng viên hướng dẫn: \textbf{TS. Nguyễn Thị Mộng Ngọc}}

\vspace{1.5cm}

{\large\bfseries Nhóm 8}

\vspace{0.6em}
{\small
\renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.2}
\begin{tabular}{|>{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{3.2cm}|>{\centering\arraybackslash}p{1.8cm}|>{\raggedright\arraybackslash}p{6cm}|>{\centering\arraybackslash}p{1.8cm}|}
\hline
\textbf{Họ và Tên} & \textbf{Mã số HV} & \textbf{Công việc} & \textbf{Mức độ hoàn thành} \\
\hline
Trần Việt Hà & 25C23020 &
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, topsep=0pt, partopsep=0pt, itemsep=2pt, parsep=0pt]
\item Kiểm tra các giả định của mô hình, rút ra nhận xét, kết luận
\item Đề xuất cải tiến
\item Kiểm định các hiệu ứng liên quan đến "Time"
\item So sánh kết quả với ANOVA k nhân tố
\end{itemize}
& 100\% \\
\hline
Nguyễn Đình Mai Vi & 25C23005 &
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, topsep=0pt, partopsep=0pt, itemsep=2pt, parsep=0pt]
\item ANOVA k nhân tố
\item Nhận xét ưu điểm, hạn chế, khác biệt trong cách diễn giải của hai cách tiếp cận
\end{itemize}
& 100\% \\
\hline
Vũ Hà Thư & 25C23004 &
\begin{itemize}[leftmargin=*, topsep=0pt, partopsep=0pt, itemsep=2pt, parsep=0pt]
\item Tiền xử lý dữ liệu, Trực quan hóa dữ liệu
\item Xây dựng mô hình với nhân tố lặp "Time"
\end{itemize}
& 100\% \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
}

\vfill

{\large TP. Hồ Chí Minh, 2026}

\vspace{0.8cm}
\end{center}
\end{titlepage}

\tableofcontents
\newpage
```


```{r child="parts/DatVanDe.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/PhanChinh_1_2.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/PhanChinh_3.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/PhanChinh_4.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/PhanChinh_5.Rmd"}
```

\newpage

# Yêu cầu mở rộng

```{r child="parts/Yeucauphu_1.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/Yeucauphu_2.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/Yeucauphu_3.Rmd"}
```

```{r child="parts/Yeucauphu_4.Rmd"}
```

# Tài liệu tham khảo

```{=latex}
\raggedright
```

Almohalwas, A. *Memory Test on Drugged Islanders Data*. Kaggle. <https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/steveahn/memory-test-on-drugged-islanders-data>
